feed.title: GMKim's Inventory
feed.subtitle: Undergraduate Student. Mechanical Engineering. Interested in AI & Robotics.

entry.title: How to handle Git? (1) - Clone, Init, Push

link.title: How to handle Git? (1) - Clone, Init, Push

entry.summary: Introduction Since it is difficult to handle a lot of codes from different project members, most developers or researchers use Github as their remote storage (repository). Unlike other cloud services like Google Drive, OneDrive, and Dropbox, Github requires some basic knowledge about Git and its command. Thus, throughout several pages, I’d like to simply organize the concepts with command-line...

entry.title: How to execute AppImage file on Linux Ubuntu

link.title: How to execute AppImage file on Linux Ubuntu

entry.summary: Introduction This page describes how to execute AppImage format file (.AppImage) on Linux Ubuntu. Note that the working environment is Ubuntu 20.04 LTS (Focal Fossa). Method Open the properties of AppImage file, and move to Permissions tab. At the Execute part, Allow executing file as program might not be checked at first. Activate it by checking the box, and you can install or execute ...

entry.title: Command for Anaconda (on MacOS)
entry.summary: Introduction This page includes several Anaconda commands that are frequently used on MacOS terminal. Basics conda env list It shows the list of virtual environments which are set on the computer. Currently located environment is marked as asterisk(*). conda activate {env_name} It activates / moves to the environment called {env_name}. conda deactivate It deactiv...

entry.title: PyTorch Learning_Tensor Manipulation (2)
entry.summary: Introduction This note is based on the lecture note (to be exact, the wiki documentary) written in Korean. It is about the introductory informations of Deep Learning with PyTorch. PyTorch로 시작하는 딥 러닝 입문(KOR) Here, I’d like to write more about some functions to handle Pytorch Tensor. Tensor Manipulation - Part 2 3. Handling Tensors - Part 2 Mean It gives the mean value of...

entry.title: PyTorch Learning_Tensor Manipulation (1)
entry.summary: Introduction This note is based on the lecture note (to be exact, the wiki documentary) written in Korean. It is about the introductory informations of Deep Learning with PyTorch.
